# Agent skills for `zarfld/presonus-studiolive-mcp`

These skills are designed to reduce documentation drift, prevent broad “complete” claims, preserve required live-sound functionality, and stop YAGNI from deleting or hiding currently required behavior.

Suggested placement:

```text
.skills/
  repo-truth-maintenance/SKILL.md
  mcp-capability-inventory/SKILL.md
  routing-confidence-probe-promotion/SKILL.md
  hil-validation/SKILL.md
  issue-traceability-remediation/SKILL.md
  sound-engineer-boundary-yagni/SKILL.md
AGENTS.addendum.md
```

Use these as contracts. They are intentionally procedural and acceptance-criteria-heavy rather than motivational prompts.
